body:
## Summary
- Replace the citizenship requirements official source rows with real Expo `Link` anchors using `href`, `_blank`, and `noreferrer` while keeping the visible publisher/date/URL metadata.
- Add focused parity assertions that reject a regression back to `Linking.openURL(source.url)` source rows.
- Extend the legal external-link browser spec with Swedish and English `/citizenship-requirements` source-link coverage.

## Validation
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-citizenship-requirements-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern "citizenship requirement sources|source link|href|target|noreferrer|Linking.openURL"`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH prettier --check app/citizenship-requirements.tsx tests/content-citizenship-requirements-parity.test.js tests/e2e/legal-external-links.spec.ts && git diff --check -- app/citizenship-requirements.tsx tests/content-citizenship-requirements-parity.test.js tests/e2e/legal-external-links.spec.ts`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/legal-external-links.spec.ts --workers=1 -g "/citizenship-requirements"`
title: [codex] render citizenship requirement sources as anchors
